data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta To Face Lawsuits Over Teen Social Media Addiction: Judge Rejects Dismissal Motions From Reddit, YouTube, And Snapchat In Personal Injury Claims
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. has been ordered to face lawsuits from over 30 U.S. states accusing the company of contributing to teen mental health issues by making its platforms addictive, despite some protections under Section 230.

data.title: Bitcoin Marches Ahead, Ethereum, Dogecoin Flat Amid Stocks' Reversal: Analyst Highlights Factors Supporting King Crypto's Rise To $71K
data.description: Market bellwether Bitcoin maintained its upsurge Tuesday, defying the sharp decline in stock prices.

data.title: Elon Musk Announces Tesla Semi 'Will Be Available Worldwide' Amid Growing Skepticism Over 500-Mile Range And Autonomous Features
data.description: Elon Musk has announced the global launch of the Tesla Inc Semi truck on social media platform X, as demand for the electric vehicle continues to grow.

data.title: ASML, Walgreens, Trump Media, United Airlines, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description:
